untranslatable_reason: Candlestick pattern detection requires multi-bar analysis: (1) Downtrend context cannot be expressed without lookback window or trend confirmation; (2) Doji detection requires 'gap lower' and 'close at or near opening' logic across 3 consecutive bars which requires indexed bar access (candle[i-2], candle[i-1], candle[i]) not available in allowed operators; (3) Gap detection between bars requires prev_high/prev_low comparison logic that is implicit in pattern definition but not explicitly translatable with single-bar indicators
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation: Entry condition approximates (1) black candle via body<0, (2) doji via open==close, (3) bullish gap via close>prev_high. However, true pattern requires sequential 3-bar validation with downtrend confirmation which exceeds single-condition capability. Recommend using explicit candlestick pattern library or adding 'downtrend_bars' lookback parameter to entry_long conditions.
